rationale: The cited paper appears directly relevant to the citing paper’s core premise of effects beyond the focal customer: the citing note emphasizes “downstream customer value” and social mechanisms of referrals, while the cited note specifically studies “social effects of CRM campaigns” and quantifies spillovers to connected nontargeted customers. Given this strong conceptual overlap (and a verified DOI match), this does not look like an obvious incidental mention and should be reviewed in full.
